summary: 5 League Fixes in Admin Panel - All Tests PASSED. Fix1: Admin count from memberships with 'Admin Lega' column header. Fix2: National league NOT in at-risk alerts (only private custom leagues shown). Fix3: 3 league type badges (NAZIONALE, PRIVATA NAZ., PRIVATA CUSTOM) with filter dropdown. Fix4: League rules summary in table + full detail modal with scoring_config table. Fix5: Super Admin edit rules with ATTENZIONE warning and confirm=true requirement.

verified_features: Fix 1: 'Admin Lega' column header in leagues table
Fix 1: Admin count from memberships (role in ['admin','owner'])
Fix 1: National league owner displays as 'Sistema' instead of 'Nessuno'
Fix 2: GET /api/rbac/dashboard-stats excludes national league from at_risk
Fix 2: Only private custom leagues (not national, not private-national) in at_risk list
Fix 3: Three league type badges: NAZIONALE (green), PRIVATA NAZ. (teal), PRIVATA CUSTOM (blue)
Fix 3: Type filter dropdown with options: Tutti i tipi, Nazionale, Privata - Personalizzata, Privata - Lega Nazionale
Fix 3: Filtering by league type works correctly
Fix 4: 'Regole' column in table shows summary (markets, matchday range, deadline)
Fix 4: League detail modal shows: ID, season, matchday range, deadline, match source type, championship predictions, members, owner
Fix 4: Scoring config displayed as table in detail modal with Market/Stato/Punti columns
Fix 5: 'Modifica Regole' button visible only for Super Admin
Fix 5: Edit rules modal shows red ATTENZIONE warning box
Fix 5: Edit form has market checkboxes with points, matchday range, deadline, championship inputs
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard_stats correctly filters out national leagues (league_type=national) and private-national leagues (match_source_type=national) from at_risk
Admin count uses memberships collection with role in ['admin','owner'] - not RBAC roles
getLeagueTypeKey function correctly identifies 3 types: national, private_national, private_custom
Edit rules endpoint has proper super admin check before allowing updates
Audit logging implemented for EDIT_LEAGUE_RULES action

test_credentials.standard_user: ilio@raimondi.it / password123 (Non-admin - correctly denied admin panel access)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing leagues for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 league fixes tested and working. National league ID: f1373417-43aa-4043-b6a2-125873181c95. Admin panel is backend-rendered at /api/admin-ui. Non-super-admin users are correctly blocked from editing league rules. The edit rules modal updates are reflected in the leagues list after save.
